title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 20th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Upgraded from earlier 'sell' after a good result; not a buy yet, new investors may drive improvement.
recommendations.detail: Had said sell at the workshop, but after seeing the (good) Q4 result now upgrades to Hold (not a buy); new investors leading possible improvement.

recommendations.note: Buy with medium-term view; recent correction complete, can hold above 50.
recommendations.detail: Definitely buy if you have a medium-term view; recent correction is complete, stock can stay steady above 50.

recommendations.note: Flagship/investment company in the Kumar Mangalam Birla group; definitely buy.
recommendations.detail: A flagship company from the Birla group, one of the investment flagship companies in the Kumar Mangalam Birla group; definitely buy. Later rose ~6% with a full two-week average volume in 5 minutes.

recommendations.note: Non-performer for a year but in Dhanuka Group's hands; dramatic upside can't be ruled out, don't panic.
recommendations.detail: As of now hold; non-performer for the last year but in Dhanuka Group's hands (leading crop-protection/agri-chem player) so a dramatic rise can't be ruled out; just hold, don't panic.

recommendations.note: Buy only as a positional trade; bottomed out, relief rally possible on ethanol/blending demand.
recommendations.detail: Temporarily bottomed out; relief rally possible as crude problems lift ethanol/blending demand and production; could cross 400. Only as a positional trade, buy Praj.

recommendations.note: Don't sell/book loss now; bottom likely formed, held 430; decide after the broker meet.
recommendations.detail: At these levels don't sell now; bottom likely formed (held 430 after attempting 510-520), worst over; decide after the broker meet based on details.

recommendations.note: Buy on declines with a tight stop-loss; positional / medium-term.
recommendations.detail: Both TARIL and TCS can be bought on every decline with a tight stop-loss, as a positional trade and with a medium-term view.

recommendations.note: Buy on declines with a tight stop-loss; positional / medium-term.
recommendations.detail: Both TCS and TARIL can be bought on every decline with a tight stop-loss, as a positional trade and with a medium-term view.

recommendations.note: Lottery-ticket/dark-horse; has assets but control is the question; decide only after Q4, don't add before.
recommendations.detail: Lottery-ticket counter, earlier given as a dark horse; has assets (IBC-linked, takeover/asset-stripping value) but ultimate control is key; stable near 19-20, shows nominal profit (no losses); take a decision only after Q4, not before.

recommendations.note: Buy on declines; good assets + value-unlocking; near 52-week high, possible move to ~2,000 in 3-4 months.
recommendations.detail: Definitely buy on declines; apart from performance has good assets and value-unlocking potential; only one of the three near its 52-week high (even at >50 PE); possible move to 2,000 in 3-4 months (signs, not certainty).

recommendations.note: Avoid; best of railway-wagon cycle is over; lower-top/lower-bottom, only on a relief rally now.
recommendations.detail: Best of the time for railway wagon companies is over (post aggressive Vande Bharat expansion '23-'24); lower-top lower-bottom, now ~280-290 on a relief rally. Avoid, no need to buy for now.

recommendations.note: Hold 670-690; result in line, low PE (~22); consolidating after result spike.
recommendations.detail: Result came in line with expectations; consolidates after the result spike; hold between 670-690; low PE (~22) even now.

recommendations.note: Hold; commodity-dependent, silver/zinc prices likely stable near term; buy on sharp dips.
recommendations.detail: Moves depending on commodity prices; as of now silver/zinc prices may stay stable near term; hold if already bought, otherwise buy on days of sharp dips.

recommendations.note: Hold for dividends then exit; not much excitement in small PSU banks.
recommendations.detail: Hold for now (dividend season starting); at least wait for dividends, then take dividend and come out; not much excitement yet.

recommendations.note: Hold; outperforming PSU bank under hands-on new chairman; still ~8 PE, trailing stop ~175.
recommendations.detail: One of the outperforming PSU banks in recent months under new hands-on chairman (Ashish Pandey); will outperform; hold with trailing stop near 175; stock still at just 8 PE.

recommendations.note: Hold for medium-to-long term; can be an outperformer (holding co); use trailing stop to protect profits.
recommendations.detail: If medium-to-long-term investor, hold; can be an outperformer from the Adani group as the holding company; put a trailing stop to protect profits.
